content:
# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

Restricted `planned_elsewhere` neighbor inference to confirmed milestone-plan membership so unconfirmed title/implicit-slot fallbacks no longer inject adjacent beads into `prompt.md`, and normalized `upstream_dependencies`, `downstream_dependents`, and `planned_elsewhere` ordering by stable `(id, title)` keys before rendering. Updated unit and CLI regressions to cover the tightened unconfirmed-membership behavior and deterministic ordering for hashing-sensitive prompt generation.

## Steps

1. [Completed] Patched `src/cli/project.rs` so planned-elsewhere adjacency only uses confirmed plan membership and no longer falls back to implicit-slot hints for unconfirmed beads.
2. [Completed] Sorted dependency, dependent, and planned-elsewhere prompt-context collections by stable `(id, title)` keys before prompt rendering to keep `prompt.md` deterministic across equivalent inputs.
3. [Completed] Adjusted existing regressions and added focused tests for unconfirmed-membership suppression and stable ordering, including the CLI title-drift path.
4. [Completed] Ran formatting and targeted tests covering the touched prompt-generation and create-from-bead flows.

## Validation Evidence

- `cargo fmt --all` passed.
- `cargo test build_planned_elsewhere_context_ -- --nocapture` passed (4 tests).
- `cargo test build_dependency_prompt_context_sorts_items_by_id_and_title -- --nocapture` passed.
- `cargo test build_dependent_prompt_context_sorts_items_by_id_and_title -- --nocapture` passed.
- `cargo test project_create_from_bead_ --test cli -- --nocapture` passed (19 tests).

## Outstanding Risks

- Validation was focused on the amended prompt-generation paths; I did not rerun the full repository test suite or `br lint` in this pass.
- The worktree still contains the unrelated untracked `.ralph-burning/` directory, which I left untouched.
